contents.value:
**Source:** [Device Tree Specification](https://devicetree-specification.readthedocs.io/)

## linux,initrd-start

Property name: `linux,initrd-start`

Value type: `<u32>` or `<u64>`

Specifies the physical start address of an initial ramdisk image in memory, set by the bootloader. Used together with `linux,initrd-end`.
